reasoning: Addressing your lactate clearance is crucial to improve your sustained power for events like the Alpine Loop. Your last ride indicates your endurance building (TSS trend: building), making it an ideal time to tackle this limiter. A focus on intensive over-unders will enhance your aerobic base and fatigue resistance, critical for the long climbs in the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 8-minute over-unders: 2 minutes at 242-256W (over), followed by 2 minutes at 201-218W (under), repeat the cycle twice per set with 5-minute easy spinning at 155W between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
